title: Language Change - Checking pop up if at least one component is at low battery
scenario: Language update blocked with low battery pop-up when any connected component has less than 5% battery
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device (single headset, earbuds, or earbuds with smart case) is connected.
3. Verify that at least one component of the connected device (headset, earbud, or smart case) has a battery level below 5%.
4. Navigate to the Device Settings screen for the connected device.
5. Attempt to change the language setting for the device.
expected: The app displays a pop-up message: "Update currently not available, please try back later" and prevents the language update from proceeding.
